message:
Running command: # FP_TEMPLATE_COPY_POWER_PINS was False in step 22! So the fix WAS applied.
# But DRT-0302 still fires. Let me check the FULL DRT log to see what net it complains about.
grep -n "DRT-0302\|bterm\|VDDIO\|multiple" /tmp/pnr_v4_drt.log | head -10

function.arguments: {"command": "# FP_TEMPLATE_COPY_POWER_PINS was False in step 22! So the fix WAS applied.\n# But DRT-0302 still fires. Let me check the FULL DRT log to see what net it complains about.\ngrep -n \"DRT-0302\\|bterm\\|VDDIO\\|multiple\" /tmp/pnr_v4_drt.log | head -10"}
function.name: execute_bash

args.command:
# FP_TEMPLATE_COPY_POWER_PINS was False in step 22! So the fix WAS applied.
# But DRT-0302 still fires. Let me check the FULL DRT log to see what net it complains about.
grep -n "DRT-0302\|bterm\|VDDIO\|multiple" /tmp/pnr_v4_drt.log | head -10
